summary: Draft PR against sysdolphin baselib SObj code that typed HSD_SObj color byte fields as GXColor, updated callers accordingly, implemented HSD_SObjLib_803A477C, and added a large partial HSD_SObjLib_803A4A68 body. Bot output reported one new function match for HSD_SObjLib_803A477C, large unmatched improvement for HSD_SObjLib_803A4A68, and regressions including a broken HSD_SObjLib_803A54EC match and data-section regressions. The PR was closed unmerged and explicitly superseded by PR #2485.

key_files.role: Main decomp work: added includes, local helper structs/data, implemented HSD_SObjLib_803A477C, and added a large partial HSD_SObjLib_803A4A68 implementation using GX/HSD state calls, trig, FIFO writes, and PAD_STACK.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: sobjlib.c HSD_SObjLib_803A477C body replaces placeholder
raw_diff: sobjlib.c HSD_SObjLib_803A4A68 body replaces placeholder
text_corpus: decomp-dev bot report lists HSD_SObjLib_803A477C 0.00% to 100.00% and HSD_SObjLib_803A4A68 0.00% to 97.28%

key_files.role: Header/type update: collapsed individual color bytes at offsets 0x38-0x3F into GXColor x38 and GXColor x3C, and changed HSD_SObjLib_803A477C priority parameter type from int to u8.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: HSD_SObj fields x38-x3F changed from u8 fields to GXColor x38 and GXColor x3C
raw_diff: HSD_SObjLib_803A477C prototype fifth parameter changed to u8

key_files.role: Caller update for HSD_SObj color field typing: direct byte fields x3C-x3F were rewritten as GXColor channel fields r/g/b/a.

what_changed.text: Implemented HSD_SObjLib_803A477C in sobjlib.c, including allocation, HSD_ASSERT, GXInitTlutObj/GXInitTexObjCI/GXInitTexObj setup, default SObj field initialization, optional second texture setup, texture coordinate scaling from GXGetTexObjWidth/Height, and insertion via HSD_SObjLib_803A44D4.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report shows HSD_SObjLib_803A477C +612 bytes, 0.00% to 100.00%

what_changed.text: Added a substantial HSD_SObjLib_803A4A68 implementation with GX vertex/TEV setup, Z texture branches, texture-format switch handling, constant color loads through local stack temporaries, direct FIFO writes to 0xCC008000, trig-based quad coordinate computation, and state cleanup.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report shows HSD_SObjLib_803A4A68 +2618 bytes, 0.00% to 97.28%

what_changed.text: Changed HSD_SObj color storage in sobjlib.h from eight separate u8 fields to two GXColor fields, x38 and x3C.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: sobjlib.h offsets 0x38 and 0x3C changed to GXColor

what_changed.text: Updated gmregtyfall.c callsite code to use GXColor component names r, g, b, and a for HSD_SObj::x3C instead of raw byte fields x3C-x3F.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gmregtyfall.c color assignments rewritten to x3C.r/g/b/a

what_changed.text: Adjusted HSD_SObjLib_803A477C declaration and definition to use u8 priority for the fifth parameter.

Introduced local structs SObjLibData and SObjLibSObjDesc plus local static color constants lbl_804DEA80 through lbl_804DEA90; the bot report also noted .data, .sdata, .sdata2, and .sbss score movement.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: static s32 lbl_804DEA80 through lbl_804DEA90
text_corpus: bot report lists .sdata2 and .sdata improvements and .data/.sbss regressions

smart_moves.text: Recovered color-byte semantics into GXColor fields and propagated the typed access to an existing game-mode caller, improving readability over individual byte offsets.
Used HSD_ASSERT for the allocation check in the new HSD_SObjLib_803A477C body rather than leaving a raw assert expansion in the shown diff.
Kept the HSD_SObjLib_803A477C prototype in the header synchronized with the recovered body by narrowing priority to u8.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: sobjlib.c definition fifth parameter u8 priority
raw_diff: sobjlib.h prototype fifth parameter u8

decomp_lessons.lesson: When adjacent bytes are used as RGBA channels and passed to GX color APIs, a typed GXColor field can make both the owning struct and callsites clearer than raw byte members.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: HSD_SObj x38/x3C changed to GXColor
raw_diff: HSD_SObjLib_803A4A68 passes sobj->x38 and sobj->x3C to GXSetTevColor

decomp_lessons.lesson: A code match that introduces or rearranges local data symbols can improve text while still causing data-section regressions; the bot report should be carried forward with the PR context rather than treating the code body as cleanly landed.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report lists one new match and HSD_SObjLib_803A4A68 improvement
text_corpus: bot report lists HSD_SObjLib_803A54EC broken match and .data/.sbss regressions
human_pr_text: author says regression will be fixed when linking

naming_conventions.text: The PR retained address-style function and data names such as HSD_SObjLib_803A477C, HSD_SObjLib_803A4A68, and lbl_804DEA80-lbl_804DEA90 where stronger semantic names were not provided by the slice.
New temporary/local names remain largely role-or-register based, including temp_f31, temp_r29, var_f30, sp74, desc_arg, and use_x8; no evidence in this slice establishes more semantic names.
Recovered struct fields in temporary PR-local SObjLibSObjDesc remain offset-style x0, x4, x8, while HSD_SObj color subfields use GXColor channel names r/g/b/a via the GXColor type.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: PAD_STACK(0x10) was used inside HSD_SObjLib_803A4A68; the slice does not include narrow objdiff justification for this tactic beyond the bot-reported 97.28% unmatched-item improvement.
Direct volatile FIFO writes to 0xCC008000 were used after GXBegin to emit quad vertex and texture coordinate floats.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: repeated *(volatile f32*) 0xCC008000 writes in HSD_SObjLib_803A4A68

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: The implementation used explicit stack temporaries and pointer casts to pass packed constant colors to GXSetTevColorS10 and GXSetTevKColor.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: sp60/sp64, sp58/sp5C, sp50/sp54 with GXSetTevKColor

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Switch grouping over texture formats was used in HSD_SObjLib_803A4A68 for repeated TEV setup cases.

review_feedback.text: decomp-dev bot reported matched code +0.01% (+372 bytes), one new match HSD_SObjLib_803A477C at 100%, a broken match HSD_SObjLib_803A54EC from 100.00% to 99.95%, HSD_SObjLib_803A4A68 improvement to 97.28%, and data-section score changes including .data and .sbss regressions.
Author commented that a regression would be fixed when linking.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: regression will be fixed when linking

review_feedback.text: A later comment states the PR was superseded by PR #2485; no review comments are present in the loaded slice.

searchable_terms: regression will be fixed when linking

follow_up_queries.reason: Loaded comments say PR #2471 was superseded by PR #2485; curator should compare the successor before promoting lessons.

follow_up_queries.query: HSD_SObj GXColor x38 x3C gmregtyfall x3C.a
follow_up_queries.reason: Trace whether the GXColor field typing survived in later source and whether additional callsites were updated.
Find later validation or cleanup for the PAD_STACK and direct FIFO-write tactics.
Follow the reported regression and data-section movements before treating this PR as a clean decomp improvement.

follow_up_queries.query: lbl_804DEA80 lbl_804DEA84 lbl_804DEA88 lbl_804DEA8C lbl_804DEA90 GXSetTevKColor
follow_up_queries.reason: Investigate later ownership/naming of the static packed color constants.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Use GXColor for proven SObj color byte groups
accepted_candidate_records.text: In this PR, HSD_SObj offsets 0x38 and 0x3C were changed from individual u8 byte fields to GXColor fields, and callsites were updated to channel access r/g/b/a. This is candidate evidence that typed graphics color fields can replace raw byte fields when GX API usage and callsites support the RGBA interpretation.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: HSD_SObjLib_803A4A68 GXSetTevColor uses sobj->x38 and sobj->x3C

accepted_candidate_records.title: Carry bot regression reports with superseded decomp PRs
accepted_candidate_records.text: This PR showed a new matched function and a large partial improvement while also reporting a broken match and data-section regressions, then was superseded. Candidate lesson: preserve bot regression details with superseded PR intake so later curation does not overstate a partial code match as clean progress.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: regression will be fixed when linking

source_update_candidates.title: Typed graphics structs can replace raw color byte fields when GX API use proves channel grouping
source_update_candidates.text: Consider adding an example under typed-fields-over-pointer-math or conservative-naming: if adjacent byte fields are passed as GXColor or accessed consistently as RGBA channels, prefer a typed GXColor field and update callsites to .r/.g/.b/.a rather than keeping x3C-x3F byte fields.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: HSD_SObj x38/x3C changed to GXColor
raw_diff: HSD_SObjLib_803A4A68 GXSetTevColor uses typed colors
source_update_candidates.reason: The PR provides concrete evidence for a reusable typing pattern, but because it was closed unmerged and superseded, curator should compare with successor PR #2485 before adding a global example.

source_update_candidates.title: PAD_STACK in large partial graphics functions needs explicit validation notes
source_update_candidates.text: Consider adding or cross-linking an example that PAD_STACK inside large GX/graphics functions should not be treated as accepted style without objdiff/build evidence and adjacent regression checks.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: HSD_SObjLib_803A4A68 reported 97.28% but not matched
text_corpus: bot report lists broken HSD_SObjLib_803A54EC and data regressions
source_update_candidates.reason: The slice illustrates the risk, but it does not prove PAD_STACK was necessary or accepted; this should remain a standards example candidate only.

source_update_candidates.title: sobjlib.c owns HSD_SObjLib_803A477C and HSD_SObjLib_803A4A68 decomp work in PR #2471
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2471 touched src/sysdolphin/baselib/sobjlib.c for HSD_SObjLib_803A477C and HSD_SObjLib_803A4A68, src/sysdolphin/baselib/sobjlib.h for HSD_SObj typing/prototype updates, and src/melee/gm/gmregtyfall.c for caller color field updates.
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful historical path context, but should be reconciled with the superseding PR before being promoted.

rejection_notes: Do not promote HSD_SObjLib_803A4A68 as matched; bot evidence only says 97.28% after the PR.
Do not claim this PR was merged; metadata shows merged_at null and the PR was closed.
Do not infer reviewer approval or requested changes; loaded metadata shows zero review comments and zero reviews.
Do not treat the static lbl_804DEA80-lbl_804DEA90 names or data placement as accepted ownership; bot output reported data-section regressions and the PR was superseded.
Do not accept PAD_STACK(0x10) as necessary from this slice alone; no objdiff or build justification is loaded.
